channel.title: Bloomberg Green Global
channel.description: Últimos artigos de Bloomberg Green Global

item.title: UK, Japan Plan to Sign £18 Billion Clean Energy Investment Deal
item.description: The UK and Japan are expected to agree on an £18 billion ($24.1 billion) deal that they predict will create new jobs in the offshore wind, infrastructure and financial services sectors, UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer’s office said in a statement Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Maria Paula Mijares Torres

item.title: How One Startup Is Trying to Coax Rain From Clouds
item.description: The technology is needed on a drier planet
item.dc:creator: Kyle Stock, Olivia Rudgard

item.title: China Maps Out Heavy‑Truck Electrification Push With 40% Goal
item.description: China has set out a plan to scale up new‑energy heavy-duty trucks, targeting 40% market penetration and a fleet exceeding 1.6 million vehicles by 2030.
item.dc:creator: Charlie Zhu, Ying Tian
